    HintName: TestApp.CalculatorRouter.g.cs,
    Source:
// <auto-generated />
#nullable enable

using System;
using System.Linq;
using System.Text.Json;
using System.Threading;
using System.Threading.Tasks;
using Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection;
using Ryn.Ipc;

namespace TestApp;

file sealed class CalculatorRouter : ICommandRouter
{
    public bool CanRoute(string command) => command is "add" or "multiply" or "divide";

    public async ValueTask<string> RouteAsync(
        string command, ReadOnlyMemory<byte> args, IServiceProvider services, CancellationToken cancellationToken)
    {
        switch (command)
        {
            case "add":
            {
                using var __doc = JsonDocument.Parse(args);
                var __root = __doc.RootElement;
                var __has0 = __root.TryGetProperty("a", out var __prop0);
                if (!__has0)
                    throw new RynIpcArgumentException("add", "a", "required argument is missing");
                var __p0 = __ReadArg(__prop0, static __e => __e.GetInt32(), "add", "a", "argument must be a JSON number");
                var __has1 = __root.TryGetProperty("b", out var __prop1);
                if (!__has1)
                    throw new RynIpcArgumentException("add", "b", "required argument is missing");
                var __p1 = __ReadArg(__prop1, static __e => __e.GetInt32(), "add", "b", "argument must be a JSON number");
                var __result = global::TestApp.Calculator.Add(__p0, __p1);
                return __result.ToString(System.Globalization.CultureInfo.InvariantCulture);
            }
            case "multiply":
            {
                using var __doc = JsonDocument.Parse(args);
                var __root = __doc.RootElement;
                var __has0 = __root.TryGetProperty("a", out var __prop0);
                if (!__has0)
                    throw new RynIpcArgumentException("multiply", "a", "required argument is missing");
                var __p0 = __ReadArg(__prop0, static __e => __e.GetInt32(), "multiply", "a", "argument must be a JSON number");
                var __has1 = __root.TryGetProperty("b", out var __prop1);
                if (!__has1)
                    throw new RynIpcArgumentException("multiply", "b", "required argument is missing");
                var __p1 = __ReadArg(__prop1, static __e => __e.GetInt32(), "multiply", "b", "argument must be a JSON number");
                var __result = global::TestApp.Calculator.Multiply(__p0, __p1);
                return __result.ToString(System.Globalization.CultureInfo.InvariantCulture);
            }
            case "divide":
            {
                using var __doc = JsonDocument.Parse(args);
                var __root = __doc.RootElement;
                var __has0 = __root.TryGetProperty("a", out var __prop0);
                if (!__has0)
                    throw new RynIpcArgumentException("divide", "a", "required argument is missing");
                var __p0 = __ReadArg(__prop0, static __e => __e.GetDouble(), "divide", "a", "argument must be a JSON number");
                var __has1 = __root.TryGetProperty("b", out var __prop1);
                if (!__has1)
                    throw new RynIpcArgumentException("divide", "b", "required argument is missing");
                var __p1 = __ReadArg(__prop1, static __e => __e.GetDouble(), "divide", "b", "argument must be a JSON number");
                var __result = global::TestApp.Calculator.Divide(__p0, __p1);
                return (double.IsFinite(__result) ? __result.ToString(System.Globalization.CultureInfo.InvariantCulture) : "null");
            }
            default:
                throw new RynCommandNotFoundException(command);
        }
    }

    private static string __ToJson(string? value)
    {
        if (value is null) return "null";
        var sb = new System.Text.StringBuilder(value.Length + 2);
        sb.Append('"');
        foreach (var c in value)
        {
            switch (c)
            {
                case '\\': sb.Append("\\\\"); break;
                case '"': sb.Append("\\\""); break;
                case '\n': sb.Append("\\n"); break;
                case '\r': sb.Append("\\r"); break;
                case '\t': sb.Append("\\t"); break;
                case '\b': sb.Append("\\b"); break;
                case '\f': sb.Append("\\f"); break;
                default:
                    if (c < ' ' || c == '\u2028' || c == '\u2029')
                        sb.Append($"\\u{(int)c:X4}");
                    else
                        sb.Append(c);
                    break;
            }
        }
        sb.Append('"');
        return sb.ToString();
    }

    // Runs a single JSON->parameter conversion and reshapes a type mismatch into a
    // descriptive RynIpcArgumentException (naming the command + parameter), matching the
    // missing/null guards above instead of leaking System.Text.Json's opaque exception.
    // The reader is a non-capturing `static` lambda, so the delegate is cached (no per-call alloc).
    private static T __ReadArg<T>(
        System.Text.Json.JsonElement element,
        System.Func<System.Text.Json.JsonElement, T> read,
        string command, string parameter, string reason)
    {
        try
        {
            return read(element);
        }
        catch (System.Exception __ex) when (
            __ex is System.InvalidOperationException
                or System.FormatException
                or System.OverflowException
                or System.Text.Json.JsonException
                or System.IndexOutOfRangeException)
        {
            throw new RynIpcArgumentException(command, parameter, reason);
        }
    }
}

public static class CalculatorRynExtensions
{
    public static IServiceCollection AddCalculator(this IServiceCollection services)
    {
        services.AddSingleton<ICommandRouter, CalculatorRouter>();
        return services;
    }
}

  }
]
